# AVCaptionUnitsType.unspecified

**Case**

An unspecified unit type.

## Declaration

```swift
case unspecified
```

## Discussion

An unspecified unit type indicates the caption dimension is invalid.

## Unit types

- **AVCaptionUnitsType.cells**: A cell-based unit type.
- **AVCaptionUnitsType.percent**: A percentage-based unit type.
title: AVCaptionUnitsType.unspecified
